meta.x_baseline_method: views / author-platform median views over videos >=72h old (min 5 videos); null when no reliable baseline
meta.growth_method: follower magnet (validated 7/2026, FOLLOWER_GROWTH_STUDY): gold = views_hr >= own p95 VPH AND eng >= own p75; silver = views_hr >= own p90 AND eng >= own p50; "own" = author x platform 6mo history, min 20 videos; eng_top = top-N% engagement rank within own history; engagement alone is NOT predictive of follower growth
